companyDescription.title: Company Description
companyDescription.text:
Are you an intern looking to build your skills with practical experience and work with customers delivering new products to new markets?  Bosch Ridecare is seeking an intern to support our team in developing demonstrators and next generation products.   Our Vision is “We shape the future of transportation. Every day, we make rides more comfortable, safe, and secure.”  We decide and move fast to increase our learning speed in the market to fulfill customer needs and unlock as much value as possible from our services.

Bosch RideCare operates within the Connected Services product area of Bosch, which develops state of the art solutions as well as advanced features leading to the future of vehicle electronics.  The Ridecare team works with international colleagues and focuses on innovating and developing solutions for fleet customers in many new market segments.

Apply now to become part of the exciting and growing field of mobility solutions.

jobDescription.title: Job Description
jobDescription.text:
Support Software and Go-To-Market teams in ensuring seamless customer experiences for the RideCare product line. This role focuses on supporting local application engineering development, Go-To-Market initiatives, customer demonstrator development, and local operating needs. It is an exciting opportunity to work in a collaborative, fast-paced environment where you'll contribute to customer satisfaction and data-driven decisions—and yes, sometimes that means rolling up your sleeves on tasks that aren't always glamorous.

Responsibilities:

  • Collaborate with Go-To-Market and Engineering teams to support demonstrator development for product marketing.
  • Support the Engineering team with system evaluations, performance tracking and data collection of next generation devices
  • Document processes, workflows, and best practices on internal wikis and knowledge-sharing platforms to strengthen organizational learning.
  • Take on additional projects and operational support tasks as needed to help the team succeed.

qualifications.title: Qualifications
qualifications.text:
Required Qualifications:

 

  • Currently enrolled in a program for Computer Science, Data Science, Information Technology, Systems Engineering, or a related field
  • Minimum of two semesters completed with a cumulative GPA of 3.0 or higher
  • Proficiency with data analytics tools such as Excel, Power BI, or Tableau
  • Strong communication skills (oral and written) to collaborate effectively with global team members and customers
  • Self-motivated and able to work both independently and collaboratively

 

Preferred Qualifications:

 

  • Experience with scripting languages such as Python or SQL
  • Hands-on experience with Linux environments, including embedded systems
  • Familiarity with hardware development, including Single Board Computers such as Arduino and Raspberry Pi

additionalInformation.title: Additional Information
additionalInformation.text:
Indefinite U.S. work authorized individuals only.  Future sponsorship for work authorization unavailable. 

Individual pay is determined based on several factors, including, but not limited to, work experience and job knowledge, complexity of the role, job location, etc.

In addition to your base salary, Bosch offers a comprehensive benefits package that includes health, dental, and vision plans; health savings accounts (HSA); flexible spending accounts; 401(K) retirement plans with an employer match; wellness programs; life insurance; short- and long-term disability insurance; paid time off; parental leave, adoption assistance; and reimbursement of education expenses.

Learn more about our full benefits offerings by visiting: www.myboschbenefits.com. Pay ranges included in the postings generally reflect base salary; certain positions may include bonus, commission, or additional benefits.

Equal Opportunity Employer, including disability / veterans. 

Please note that employment is contingent upon the successful completion of a drug screen and background check. Candidates who have been offered the position must pass both screenings before their start date.
